name: ai-platform
description: AI Platform - Reusable AI SDK and Core for multiple applications

scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=@ai-platform/shared-types && npm run build --workspace=@ai-platform/shared-utils && npm run build --workspace=@ai-platform/ai-core && npm run build --workspace=@ai-platform/ai-sdk
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=claude-day1 && npm run test --workspace=@ai-platform/ai-core
scripts.services:start: concurrently "node ai-learning-content/app.js" "npm run start --prefix ai-content-service" "npm run dev --workspace=ai-learning-hub"
